Activated Alumina

Adsorbents • Activated Alumina

Adsorbents

Activated Alumina

Activated alumina is a durable adsorbent for drying and fluoride removal in industrial utilities and process plants.

Download DatasheetRequest TDS / CoA / Quote
Applications
Compressed air drying, fluoride removal, hydrogen and natural gas dehydration
Typical Specifications
High surface area; low dust; high crush strength; broad adsorption range
Grades / Forms
Granules, pellets
Technical Notes
Temperature and regeneration cycle should be matched to service conditions; suitable for high-throughput beds.
Documentation
CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
